extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won sprint finish after bike change inside final 3km, while intermediate sprint battles between GC contenders produced no time gaps
tactical_patterns: ROGLIC refused cooperation with EVENEPOEL in breakaway attempt, prioritizing intermediate sprint seconds over stage-winning move formation.
Bahrain chased SOLANA's solo move protecting LANDA's time-on-GC despite only intermediate sprint seconds at stake.
GROVES completed bike change inside 3km without panic, suggesting pre-planned mechanical protocols for sprint finishes work effectively.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: visibly frustrated with ROGLIC's non-cooperation in breakaway, suggesting psychological vulnerability when tactical plans fail
rider_signals.SOLANA Marc: positive: attacked solo before intermediate sprint while on same GC time as LANDA, gained 4th overall through bonus seconds
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: took teammate's bike final 3km and still won sprint, exceptional composure under pressure
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: prioritized intermediate sprint seconds over stage-winning cooperation, calculated GC defense over opportunism
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: team burned energy chasing intermediate sprint threats despite minimal GC risk, defensive posture cost resources
